dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: The world changed. Not with a bang, but with a shudder. And then, the screams.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRASH! RUMBLE! SHATTER!

dialogue.speaker: NEWS REPORTER (V.O.)
dialogue.line: —live from District 7, where a Class A Calamity has just emerged from the Seoul Bay! Evacuation orders are in effect, but the creature is moving inland at an alarming rate—

dialogue.speaker: CITIZEN 1
dialogue.line: Run! It's coming this way!

dialogue.speaker: CITIZEN 2
dialogue.line: Where are the Superhumans?! Why isn't anyone doing anything?!

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: ROAR! (a monstrous, echoing sound)

dialogue.speaker: GANG HAN
dialogue.line: (Thought) 'Superhumans.' They always ask where we are. Never 'how' we are. Never 'what it costs.'

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BEEP BEEP BEEP (phone ringing insistently)

dialogue.speaker: GANG HAN
dialogue.line: Yeah, I saw the news. What's the damage report?

dialogue.speaker: TEAM LEADER KIM (on phone)
dialogue.line: Han! Thank god you picked up! It's bad, really bad. Class A, confirmed. We've got multiple casualties, infrastructure collapse... It's already taken out three blocks. Our conventional forces are useless.

dialogue.speaker: GANG HAN
dialogue.line: Coordinates.

dialogue.speaker: TEAM LEADER KIM (on phone)
dialogue.line: Sending them now. Look, I know you just got back from the Hokkaido incident, but you're our only hope. The other active Superhumans are too far or already engaged.

dialogue.speaker: GANG HAN
dialogue.line: (Thought) 'Only hope.' The same old song and dance. How many times have I heard that line? How many more times will I?

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: WHOOSH! (Gang Han leaps from a skyscraper)

dialogue.speaker: GANG HAN
dialogue.line: I'm on my way. Tell them to clear the perimeter. I don't want any civilians or soldiers getting caught in the crossfire.

dialogue.speaker: TEAM LEADER KIM (on phone)
dialogue.line: Understood. Be careful, Han. This one looks... different.

dialogue.speaker: GANG HAN
dialogue.line: (Thought) 'Different.' They always say that too. They're all different, and they're all the same. Just something else to break.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: THWIP! (a web-like appendage lashes out)

dialogue.speaker: GANG HAN
dialogue.line: There it is.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: BOOM! (Gang Han lands, cracking the pavement)

dialogue.speaker: CALAMITY
dialogue.line: SKREEEEEEE!

dialogue.speaker: GANG HAN
dialogue.line: Alright, ugly. Let's get this over with.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: FWOOSH! (Gang Han charges, leaving a trail of displaced air)

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: CRACKLE! (energy begins to coalesce around his fist)

dialogue.speaker: GANG HAN
dialogue.line: (Thought) Another day, another monster. Another city to save, another burden to bear. This is my era. The Superhuman Era.

dialogue.speaker: SFX
dialogue.line: IMPACT! KABOOM! (a devastating punch connects, sending shockwaves through the city)

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: And so, the cycle continued. A hero's weary resolve against an endless tide of destruction.

summary: A Class A Calamity emerges in Seoul, causing widespread panic and destruction. Veteran Superhuman Gang Han, weary but resolute, is called into action once again to confront the monstrous threat.
